EventHandler.Name: GenerateReport
EventHandler.Response: PackingSlipSelection( OKCANCELOPTIONAL() SETVARVALUES(CallTypeVar=V(ReportType),Whse=V(WarehouseVar),PackDate=V(PackDateVar),CoType=V(COTypeA)V(COTypeB),COTypeA=V(COTypeA),COTypeB=V(COTypeB),CoStatus=V(COStatusP) V(COStatusO) V(COStatusS) V(COStatusC),CoLineStatus=V(COLineStatusP) V(COLineStatusO) V(COLineStatusF) V(COLineStatusC),CalledFrom=V(CalledFrom),V(StartingEndingVariables),V(ReportVariables),SelectShipmentsVar=V(SelectedVar),BatchId=V(BatchId),PackingSlipTemplateVar=V(PackingSlipTemplat

Variable.Name: StartingEndingVariables
Variable.Value: StartingOrder=C(StartingOrderEdit), EndingOrder=C(EndingOrderEdit), StartingLine=V(StartingLineVar), EndingLine=V(EndingLineVar), StartingRelease=V(StartingReleaseVar), EndingRelease=V(EndingReleaseVar), StartingCustomer=C(StartingCustomerEdit), EndingCustomer=C(EndingCustomerEdit), StartingOrderDate=V(StartingOrderDateVar), EndingOrderDate=V(EndingOrderDateVar), StartingDueDate=V(StartingDueDateVar), EndingDueDate=V(EndingDueDateVar)

ScriptLines.ScriptLine: 'Enable or disable the print destination button according to what
'type of print job is being performed: printer, or file?
'Get the value from the printer combo
'Save the current value to variables for user friendliness
'The user has selected File from the drop-down. Save the
'Printer destination before replacing it with the file destination
'Now place the value of the previous filename into the editbox
'The user has selected Printer from the drop-down. Save the
'File destination before replacing it with the printer destination
'Now place the value of the previous printerdest into the editbox
